# Image Description

The image shows a **circular official seal** in black and white.

## Outer Ring Text

Around the border of the seal, the visible text reads:

**SEAL OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO**

The words are arranged in a circular layout around the emblem.

## Central Emblem

Inside the seal is a detailed crest-like scene featuring:

- A large **eagle** at the top center with wings spread.
- Beneath the eagle is a shield or central panel with radiating lines in the background.
- On the **left side**, there is a standing human figure wearing a hat and holding a long object, likely a tool or staff.
- On the **right side**, there is another standing human figure, appearing to hold or rest a hand near the head.
- At the bottom center of the inner emblem is a ribbon/banner with the motto:

**ORO EN PAZ, FIERRO EN GUERRA**

## General Appearance

- The seal is enclosed by a double circular border.
- The entire image is monochrome, using black lines on a light background.
- The design appears formal and governmental, consistent with an official municipal seal.

## Table of Visible Text

| Location | Text |
|---|---|
| Outer ring | SEAL OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO |
| Bottom banner | ORO EN PAZ, FIERRO EN GUERRA |
